sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30931" key="ei)kaste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰκ-αστέον</orth>, <sense id="n30931.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must liken, compare</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τί τινι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.374a</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:33:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
